steps.label: onboarding_landing
steps.title: ZonForge Sentinel
steps.body:
Workspace onboarding

Serial 17 Workspace 1775680474 is ready.

Your customer account, workspace, and owner membership are active. SERIAL 08 turns onboarding into a tracked tenant-scoped flow with a real dashboard handoff.

Workspace slug
serial-17-workspace-1775680474
Started: not started
Completed: not completed
Onboarding steps

Move from welcome to first scan with state stored on the tenant record and step progress stored per tenant.

Step 01
Welcome

Review your workspace setup and begin tenant onboarding.

Pending

Confirm the workspace details, move the tenant from pending to in progress, and record the onboarding start timestamp.

Start onboarding
Step 02
Connect your environment

Choose the first cloud or identity source to connect. Placeholder flow for AWS, M365, or GCP.

Pending
AWS
CloudTrail, GuardDuty, IAM, and account posture placeholders.
M365
Identity, email, and Defender placeholders for first setup.
GCP
Projects, IAM, and security telemetry placeholders.
Save environment selection
Step 03
First scan CTA

Trigger the first guided scan action and land in the dashboard.

Pending

This CTA marks onboarding complete, records the completion timestamp, and sends the tenant to the dashboard.

Complete onboarding and open dashboard
Status summary
Current onboarding state: pending.
Selected environment: AWS.
Completion requires all three onboarding steps to be marked complete.
Open dashboardOpen customer settings

Choose Business
Invoice history integration pending
Payment history

The billing dashboard is wired to live subscription state today. Invoice and payment history remain intentionally empty until a tenant-scoped backend invoice endpoint is exposed.

Integration-safe placeholder

No fake invoices are rendered here. When a real `/v1/billing/invoices` endpoint exists, this section can swap to live data without changing page structure.

Billing policy & safety notice

Professional guidance for customer admins managing a Stripe-backed subscription.

Backend-confirmed state only

This page never assumes a plan change completed until the backend reflects the Stripe-confirmed result.

Cancellation policy

Cancellation schedules the end of paid service at the current billing period boundary unless backend state says otherwise.

Secure action routing

Checkout, portal access, and cancellation buttons only call authenticated tenant-scoped backend routes.
